_meta.purpose: Per-site image-quality priors used by sites/search_orchestrator.py as a tiebreaker when title-match scores are within 0.10 of each other. NOT added to title-match — it only breaks ties.
_meta.scale: 0.0 (worst) .. 1.0 (best). Seeded from research artifact's image_quality column / 100. Replaced by observed measurements once Phase 2 (~/.aio-dl/cache/img_quality.json) has 5+ samples per (site, series).
